Introduction
    Veronika wa shinu koto ni shita is a movie starring Yôko Maki, Wan Lee, and Jun Fubuki. Towa lives in a peculiar sanatorium after committing suicide. Convalescing in sanatorium, she is informed that she has only 7 days to live....
